description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a distinctive striped pattern on its top surface, alternating between light gray stone and black bands. The sides of the block are solid black, giving it a bold, modern appearance. The stone surface appears slightly rough and speckled, suggesting a granite or similar material. The block is relatively low in height but wide and long, making it suitable as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments. The striped pattern is visually striking and may serve as a warning or demarcation feature. There are no visible engravings, handles, or interactive components on the block.
description: A rectangular stone block with a striped gray and black top and solid black sides, featuring a rough stone texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped top surface with horizontal bands and solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view with the striped pattern appearing as vertical bands and a solid black side face.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with horizontal stripes and a solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical stripes and a solid black side face.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned as part of a row of similar blocks
